articles.title: Asia stocks rise with Japan, S. Korea at record highs; tech gains ahead of Nvidia - Investing.com
articles.description: Asia stocks rise with Japan, S. Korea at record highs; tech gains ahead of Nvidia
articles.content:
Investing.com-- Most Asian stocks advanced on Wednesday with Japanese and South Korean shares rallying to record highs on strength in technology stocks.
